entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 26
entries.excerpt: Of David himself. It may be attributed to David himself, not the Mediator, the Man Christ Jesus, but the whole Church now perfectly established in Christ. Judge me, O Lord, for I have walked in my innocence Psalm 25:1. Judge me, O Lord, for, after the mercy which You first showed me, I have some desert of my innocence, the way whereof I have kept. And trusting in the Lord I shall not be moved. And yet not even so trusting in myself, but in the Lord, I shall abide in Him. Prove me, O Lord, and try me Psalm 25:2. Lest, however, any of my secret sins should be hid from me, prove me, O Lord, and…
